## 🚀 Pull Request Description

A clear and concise description of the changes you've made.

## 🎯 Related Issue(s) / Discussions

Closes # (issue number)
References # (discussion/issue number)

## 📸 Screenshots / Recordings (Optional)

If this PR includes UI changes, please provide screenshots or screen recordings showing the changes in action (Light & Dark mode).

## 🛠️ Changes Made

- [ ] Added a new feature
- [ ] Fixed a bug
- [ ] Refactored existing code
- [ ] Updated documentation
- [ ] Added content (Course/Lesson/Quiz/Challenge)

## ✅ PR Checklist

- [ ] I have tested these changes locally.
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly.
- [ ] I have linked the related issue(s).
- [ ] I have verified that the changes work in both **Light** and **Dark** modes.

---

<p align="center">
  Thank you for contributing to ProCode EduPulse! 🚀
</p>
